modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about text, values, and formulas in Excel

full_description_text:  
The user is trying to understand the differences between text, values, and formulas in Excel. They are unsure how each element functions within the application. This confusion is affecting their ability to use Excel effectively for their tasks.
short_description: Confusion about text, values, and formulas in Excel
description: The user is trying to understand the differences between text, values, and formulas in Excel. They are unsure how each element functions within the application. This confusion is affecting their ability to use Excel effectively for their tasks.
